title: CAP’2ER, un outil de l’empreinte carbone, pour accompagner les démarches de progrès
description: A tool for assessing farm-level carbon footprints through life cycle assessment, enabling farmers to identify and simulate the technical and economic impacts of sustainability actions. It outlines a structured process from detailed data collection to the construction, implementation, and follow-up of action plans to enhance environmental performance and resilience on the farm.
